meta.title: Dictum — Voice Dictation for macOS
hero.title:
Voice to text,
fully on-device.
hero.subtitle: Native macOS menu bar app for voice dictation. Speak, and the text appears where your cursor is.
highlights.label: Why Dictum
highlights.title: Not just dictation. Your voice as an interface.
highlights.vision.title: Sees your screen. Understands intent.
highlights.vision.desc: With a vision model like Gemma 4, Dictum captures your active window and automatically figures out what you need — a clean transcription or a response to what’s on screen. No mode switching, no commands. Just speak.
highlights.vision.example: Say "fix the typos in this email" — it sees the email, fixes the typos, and pastes the result. Say "write a reply" — it reads the email and drafts one. All from the same hotkey.
highlights.private.title: 100% on-device. Zero network.
highlights.private.desc: WhisperKit on Neural Engine, LLM on Metal via MLX. Your voice, your screen, your data — nothing ever leaves your Mac. Not even a DNS lookup.
highlights.smart.title: Per-app intelligence.
highlights.smart.desc: Different prompt for Slack, different for Xcode, different for Mail. Dictum knows which app you’re in and adapts its behavior automatically.
features.label: Features
features.title: Everything runs on your Mac.
features.paste.title: Auto-Paste
features.paste.desc: Transcribed text is automatically pasted wherever your cursor is. No copy-paste needed.
features.cleanup.title: LLM Cleanup
features.cleanup.desc: Optional local LLM fixes punctuation, grammar, and formatting before pasting.
features.indicator.title: Floating Indicator
features.indicator.desc: Translucent pill at your text cursor shows recording state and audio level in real time.
features.menubar.title: Menu Bar Native
features.menubar.desc: Lives in your menu bar. Configurable hotkey, hold or toggle mode. Stays out of the way.
features.multilang.title: Multilingual
features.multilang.desc: WhisperKit supports dozens of languages. Set a default or let it auto-detect. Per-app language overrides too.
features.models.title: Choose Your Models
features.models.desc: Browse and download STT and LLM models from HuggingFace. Pick the right size for your hardware.
req.label: Requirements
req.title: What you need.
install.title: Installation
install.desc: Download the latest release, unzip, and drop into Applications. The app is ad-hoc signed (not notarized), so you’ll need to clear the quarantine flag on first launch.
footer.copy: Dictum — on-device voice dictation for macOS
install.step4: Launch Dictum and follow the onboarding: grant permissions, download a speech model, and optionally an LLM
install.terminal_hint: Downloads the latest release, moves to /Applications, and clears quarantine — all in one step.
install.post_note: After installing, launch Dictum and follow the onboarding: grant permissions, download a speech model, and optionally an LLM.
